shape_semantics: code cmp,vp,vpc,naive = W,W,L,W: cmplog (I2S alone), value_profile (VP alone), and naive ALL resolve; ONLY value_profile_cmplog (vpc, both techniques) blocks. The canonical ANTI-SYNERGY / mutual-interference shape: the fuzzer holding the SUPERSET of techniques loses to each of its components AND to the baseline.

hypotheses.label: vpc's combined I2S+VP corpus admission inflates and collapses composition, starving the single-technique-found path that both cmplog-alone and value_profile-alone sustain

measurement.note: Proposed-but-not-relied-on. Would need on-disk vpc, cmplog, value_profile corpora (all available for harfbuzz) plus a fraction-of-corpus-bytes-equal-target-value computation per gate offset.

hypotheses.prediction: G1 (the test we WOULD run if it were decidable): vpc_corpus_size >> max(cmp_corpus_size, vp_corpus_size) AND vpc_target_value_fraction < min(cmp_target_value_fraction, vp_target_value_fraction) -- i.e. vpc's corpus is strictly larger yet its share of seeds carrying the decisive codepoint value is strictly lower than either single-technique fuzzer, evidencing dilution/starvation rather than a simple too-few-execs failure.
hypotheses.rule: vpc_corpus_size / max(cmp_corpus_size, vp_corpus_size) >= 1.3 AND vpc_target_value_fraction < 0.5 * min(cmp_target_value_fraction, vp_target_value_fraction)
hypotheses.why_not_decidable: Even if the rule fires, a larger-but-off-target vpc corpus is equally consistent with the NULL alternative 'vpc simply explored a different region (different seed scheduling / RNG path), and never happened to converge here' as with the causal claim 'interference starved this path.' The two are NOT separable from per-branch corpus data: interference is a counterfactual (what vpc WOULD have reached without the second technique), and corpus composition shows only what vpc DID reach. There is no positive signature of an absence.

hypotheses.label: ROUND-1 re-examination via value_distance_reached: vpc's blocking corpus stalls at a non-zero Hamming distance from the gate codepoint operand while all three resolving arms (cmplog, value_profile, naive) land at distance ~0
hypotheses.novel_vs_prior: The prior hypothesis measured corpus SIZE + target-value FRACTION (corpus_size_ratio). This re-examination instead asks the sharper positive question -- did vpc's corpus get NEAR the operand and fail (a stalled gradient) or never approach it -- using the BUILT value_distance_reached tool. It is a genuinely different measurement (per-arm min Hamming distance, not corpus composition), which is why it is recorded here rather than as a relaxed-threshold re-test of the prior.

params.note: harfbuzz is an on-disk-corpus target so this tool is RUNNABLE for both branches.

hypotheses.prediction: If vpc's loss were a clean 'failed to approach the operand' story, vpc_min_distance would be strictly > 0 while cmp_min_distance ~ vp_min_distance ~ naive_min_distance ~ 0 (all three winners resolve). A DIFFERENT mechanism -- vpc reached the operand region but a downstream/scheduling effect blocked the branch -- would instead predict vpc_min_distance ~ 0 (vpc DID place the codepoint) yet vpc still blocks. So the metric can falsify 'vpc never got near.'
hypotheses.rule: vpc_min_distance > 0.15 AND cmp_min_distance < 0.05 AND vp_min_distance < 0.05 AND naive_min_distance < 0.05
hypotheses.why_not_decidable: Two un-removable problems remain after running the tool. (G2 independence) value_distance_reached measures vpc's OWN corpus -- the same fuzzer whose blocking DEFINED the shape -- so a stalled vpc distance is not a technique-independent witness of WHY vpc lost. (Counterfactual) a non-zero vpc_min_distance is exactly as consistent with the NULL 'vpc's seed schedule explored a different region of the input space and never happened to drive THIS codepoint' as with the causal 'the added second technique interfered with the gradient climb.' value_distance_reached can confirm the gate IS a Hamming-gradient value gate (which the WW arms already tell us) and can show WHETHER vpc approached, but it CANNOT attribute a non-approach to interference rather than divergent exploration -- the interference claim is a counterfactual the corpus cannot witness.

tool_reexamination.operand_enrichment/byte_freq_ratio: NOT applicable. Measures cmplog-vs-naive byte enrichment at the gate offset; in WWLW naive RESOLVES, so the enrichment is near-zero by construction (both reach the value) and it does not measure vpc at all -- it cannot speak to vpc's loss mechanism.
tool_reexamination.value_distance_reached: RUNNABLE (recorded as hypothesis vpc_stalls_short_of_operand) but NON-DISCRIMINATING -- gives a positive 'vpc stalled near vs far' signature yet cannot separate interference from divergent exploration, and still measures vpc itself (G2). decidable:false.
tool_reexamination.joint_necessity/struct_size_and_token_co: NOT applicable. Targets the joint-necessity ASSEMBLY-DEPTH subtype where vpc builds a LARGER structure than either single technique. WWLW is the OPPOSITE: vpc is the LOSER, not the both-needing winner; there is no 'vpc reaches more' story.
tool_reexamination.token_count: NOT applicable for the same reason as joint_necessity -- vpc is the loser; a larger token count for vpc would not explain its BLOCK.
tool_reexamination.depth_reach: NOT applicable. Targets the ctx/ngram ITERATION-DEPTH subtype; these are fixed-offset 4-byte codepoint VALUE gates, not iteration/context gates, and vpc is the loser.

guardrail_status.G1: Both hypotheses carry falsifiable, discriminating-in-principle predictions, but neither's discriminating power against the divergent-exploration null can be realized from per-branch data -- so both fail G1 in practice, not by construction.
guardrail_status.G2_violation: FATAL and CONFIRMED by round-1 re-examination. The shape's label-source is exactly 'vpc blocks.' Every runnable measurement (corpus composition AND per-arm value distance) measures vpc's OWN corpus -- the same fuzzer whose blocking defined the shape. No technique-independent observable exists for an anti-synergy-of-the-superset shape; you cannot witness 'vpc blocks because of interference' with anything but vpc itself.
guardrail_status.G3: Honest non-result is the correct output. The 2 distinct harfbuzz gates (4 branch-halves) route to fallback:inconclusive. Round-1 re-examined every untried built tool (operand_enrichment, value_distance_reached, joint_necessity, token_count, depth_reach) and none discriminates; no mechanism was invented to force a label.

data_realities_respected.lineage_event_forbidden: Did NOT propose any seed_lineage:event_cooccurrence 'I2S event' or 'gradient event' descriptor -- both I2S (mutator) and VP (CMP_MAP feedback) are untagged/invisible in mutation_op (data_realities #1, #2).
data_realities_respected.byte_alignment_ok_here: These are fixed-offset 4-byte codepoint VALUE gates (contiguous_literal, equal-width seeds), so byte-fraction alignment and value_distance windows are technically valid -- the obstruction is the counterfactual/independence problem, not alignment.
data_realities_respected.corpus_targets: harfbuzz has on-disk corpora, so both proposed measurements are RUNNABLE; they are simply not DISCRIMINATING. The non-result is a logic/independence limit, not a data-availability limit (NOT marked decidable:false for corpus-absence; harfbuzz is an s4-owned on-disk target).
data_realities_respected.cross_server: No branch is marked decidable:false for corpus absence -- harfbuzz is present on s4; the verdict is a logical-independence limit valid for ALL servers/branches of this shape.

notes: ROUND 1 (loop-until-dry). Hardest shape; honest non-result RE-CONFIRMED after exhaustively re-examining every untried BUILT tool. WWLW is the superset anti-synergy: vpc holds BOTH techniques yet blocks where each component (and naive) resolves. PRIORS KEPT: vpc_corpus_inflation_interference (decidable:false, unchanged). NEW (round-1, recorded for completeness): vpc_stalls_short_of_operand via the BUILT value_distance_reached tool -- a genuinely different measurement (per-arm min Hamming distance vs the prior's corpus size/fraction) that gives a positive 'vpc stalled near/far' signature but STILL fails to discriminate interference from divergent exploration and still measures vpc itself (G2), so it is decidable:false. DECIDABLE:FALSE SUB-GROUP = both branches (harfbuzz 5624 case 0x0E37u; harfbuzz 5660 CCC118/U+0EB9 Lao sign u/uu), i.e. the entire shape. Three structural reasons the shape resists any built measurement: (1) NON-SYNTHESIZABLE emergent corpus-scale/scheduling effect over a 12h budget -- no per-branch gate property localizes it; (2) NON-DISCRIMINABLE counterfactual -- the corpus shows what vpc DID reach, not what it WOULD have reached without the second technique; (3) G2-UNATTAINABLE -- the only observable is vpc's own corpus, which is the label-source. The h0 (I2S-as-winner) vs h1 (VP-as-winner) signature split ascribes interference to the OTHER technique, but the testable residue is identical for both halves -- 'vpc's combined corpus failed to sustain the decisive codepoint' -- so all four member-halves collapse, and the collapsed hypothesis is undecidable from real-corpus data.
